strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning closely with the primary stack (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital).
Proven track record in AI-agent development and tooling, including MCP code generators and agentic workflows (re:cinq).
Strong open-source contributions and architectural leadership, evidenced by GISCollective (Node.js, Ember.js, Kubernetes) and Fluent-Asserts (TDD).
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (primary backend framework) or Vitest (testing framework) in résumé.
Secondary stack (Kotlin/Java) experience is minimal; only DLang and Java noted in legacy roles (Dunnhumby, Altom).
No direct evidence of cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure) beyond Docker/Kubernetes in GISCollective.
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong alignment with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and core responsibilities (end-to-end feature development, AI tooling) through roles at re:cinq and Optilyz. However, gaps in Nest.js/Vitest exposure and limited cloud platform details (AWS/GCP) slightly reduce fit. Leadership in open-source projects (GISCollective) and TDD practices offset concerns, but secondary stack (Kotlin/Java) experience is underrepresented.
